item.title: Michael Burry adds a new Microsoft bet, doubles down on software
item.description: Burry is leaning into what he sees as opportunities in oversold software and fintech payments stocks.

item.title: Intel is soaring after an earnings beat. These two Wall Street firms call the stock a buy
item.description: Intel's strong first-quarter financial results show the semiconductor maker can capitalize on a boom in chipmaking and AI, per two Wall Street shops.

item.title: Here are Friday's biggest analyst calls: Apple, AMD, Intel, Oracle, Caterpillar, Shake Shack & more
item.description: Here are the biggest calls on Wall Street on Friday.

item.title: Oracle is down big in 2026. Dan Ives says buy the dip
item.description: The Wedbush analyst initiated the software giant with an outperform rating.

item.title: These stocks reporting next week can beat expectations and rally, Bespoke says
item.description: CNBC Pro screened for stocks releasing quarterly financials next week that beat expectations for earnings per share at least 75% of the time.
